description: Topic queue for the weekly content agent (scripts/content-agent.mjs). The agent picks the first topic with status 'pending', writes the article, and marks it 'done'. Add new topics to the end of the list.

topics.topic: QR code statistics every marketer should know in 2026: scan rates, adoption, and conversion benchmarks
topics.angle: Data-driven roundup that positions QR flows as a mainstream acquisition channel, with practical takeaways after each stat.

topics.topic: How churches are replacing connection cards with QR codes (and why visitors prefer it)
topics.angle: Practical guide for church communications teams, contrasting paper workflows with automated digital ones.

topics.topic: The complete guide to open house lead capture for real estate agents
topics.angle: Step-by-step playbook from sign placement to CRM follow-up, emphasizing speed-to-lead and per-listing attribution.

topics.topic: Why your Google review strategy is backwards (and how QR codes fix it)
topics.angle: Contrarian take: unhappy customers review unprompted, happy ones need a frictionless in-the-moment ask.

topics.topic: Event check-in without the line: a playbook for self-service QR registration
topics.angle: Operational guide for event organizers covering signage, flow design, and post-event automation.

topics.topic: Matching gift campaigns: the psychology and mechanics of doubling every donation
topics.angle: Nonprofit fundraising deep-dive on urgency, multiplied impact framing, and automated donor updates.

topics.topic: From followers to owned audience: why creators need QR codes at live events
topics.angle: Platform-risk argument: algorithms change, email lists don't. Live appearances are peak capture moments.

topics.topic: The restaurant marketing flywheel: reviews, lists, and repeat visits from one QR code
topics.angle: Show how a single table-tent QR can feed three growth loops simultaneously.

topics.topic: Webinar no-show rates are brutal. Here's the reminder sequence that fixes them
topics.angle: Tactical breakdown of a registration-to-attendance automation sequence with timing recommendations.

topics.topic: Recurring giving 101: how to turn one-time donors into monthly partners
topics.angle: Nonprofit/church guide on the economics of recurring revenue and reducing signup friction.

topics.topic: Print isn't dead, it's a trigger: connecting physical marketing to digital journeys
topics.angle: Strategic piece on treating every printed asset as the first step of an automated funnel.

topics.topic: NPS surveys people actually answer: timing, friction, and the in-the-moment ask
topics.angle: Research-backed piece on why response timing matters more than survey design.
